title: Chi (disambiguation)
content:
'''Chi''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Chi Cho]]''', [[chairman]] of [[Pantora]]
*'''[[Chi Eekway Papanoida]]''', [[Pantoran]] [[senator]]

==Legends==
*'''[[List of computer-controlled character names in Battlefront games#Republic clone names|Chi 178 and Chi 987]]''', [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]
*'''''[[Chi 2]]''''', a [[Class-D cargo container]]
*'''''[[Chi 8]]''''', a [[cargo canister]] of [[Warhead/Legends|warheads]] recovered by [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] during the [[imperialization of Azzameen assets]]
*'''[[Chi Cho/Legends|Chi Cho]]''', [[Chairman/Legends|chairman]] of [[Pantora/Legends|Pantora]]
*'''[[Chi Eekway Papanoida/Legends|Chi Eekway Papanoida]]''', [[Pantoran/Legends|Pantoran]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]]
*'''[[Chi group]]''', a designator for [[Cargo container/Legends|cargo containers]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]

==Out–of–universe==
*'''[[Chi-Hsin Liu]]''', a layout artist for ''[[Star Wars Resistance]]''
{{Disambig}}
